items.title: Devin Booker Signs Two-Year, $145 Million Max Contract with Suns
items.blurb: Devin Booker Signs Two-Year, $145 Million Max Contract with Suns — On July 10, 2025, Devin Booker made NBA history by signing a two-year, $145 million max extension with the Phoenix Suns.
